subject: Catalog Database Test repair
commit_message:
Catalog Database Test repair

Tear down mockups
Tests for functions which don't throw exceptions any more now check for nulls or empty lists, as appropriate.  Tests for functions which don't throw exceptions and don't return anything still ignored.

Change-Id: I79d9cfd64e1f21d2c881e444b8ed7d0d5a78218d
Issue-ID: SO-489
Signed-off-by: Arthur Martella <amartell@research.att.com>
